templates.name: Cell viability and count
templates.description: Trypan blue viability and cells per mL from replicate live and dead hemocytometer counts.

templates.name: CFU per mL from plate counts
templates.description: Colony forming units per mL from a plate count, the plated dilution, and the volume plated.

templates.name: OD600 to cells per mL
templates.description: Estimate cells per mL from an OD600 reading using a per-organism conversion factor.

templates.name: Doubling time and growth rate
templates.description: Growth rate and doubling time from two cell counts and the elapsed hours between them.

templates.name: qPCR amplification efficiency
templates.description: Amplification efficiency from a standard curve slope, with an acceptable-range check.

templates.name: PCR master mix maker
templates.description: Scale a per-reaction PCR mix to a batch with overage, totalling each reagent and the full volume.

templates.name: Injection volume by body weight
templates.description: Dosing volume for an animal from the target dose, body weight, and stock concentration.

templates.name: RCF and RPM converter
templates.description: Convert between relative centrifugal force and rotor speed for a given rotor radius.

templates.name: Isotope decay correction
templates.description: Remaining activity of a radioisotope after a number of days, from its half-life.

templates.name: Shannon diversity index
templates.description: Shannon entropy and richness from per-taxon abundance counts.
